title: RandomTP
description: A Random wild teleport plugin usually use in lifesteal smps.
body:
_**This plugin Randomly teleports you like some smps. It finds beds first and if no beds found it randomly teleports.
Case1: Bed found teleports to bed
Case 2: Bed not found randomly teleports__
It also gives 4 sec blindness.
**_

### INSTALLATION

- Download the plugin 
- Upload it to plugin folder of your server
- (There is no depedencies in this plugin)

### COMMANDS AND PERMISSIONS
- /rtp: randomly teleports(has cooldown)
- /rtpcd: To check cooldown
- /changecd <SECONDS>: To change the cooldown
- /rtpreload: To reload config.yml and messages.yml
- rtp.use: permission to use all the commands

### config.yml
- You can change minimum and maximum radius between tp of players
- If tps issues then change max radius to 200-300 Default is 500
- you can also change cooldown from config.yml default is 60 sec

Honestly best rtp plugin.
Please report any issues in discussion.
